category_sources: source_facts.description says Curses-based interface to the GNU Debugger; official cgdb homepage calls it a curses interface to GDB.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cgdb; official documentation title uses CGDB.
docs_sources: Official cgdb homepage links online HTML and PDF documentation under cgdb.github.io/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official cgdb homepage lists latest sources as git clone git://github.com/cgdb/cgdb.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a curses-based GNU Debugger interface; official homepage describes terminal UI debugging features.
